original_snippet_context: Discussion of the Minister of Finance's role and relationship with the Banco do Brasil.
relevant_quote: O Sr. ministro da fazenda, em officio que dirigiu hontem ao Dr. Custodio Coelho, director da Carteira de Cambio do Banco do Brasil...
justification: This snippet mentions the "Carteira de Cambio" (Exchange Desk) of the Banco do Brasil and the Minister of Finance, but it does not discuss the Caixa de Conversão or express any opinion related to the monetary debates surrounding it.
